chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-450 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FOR DIRECTION: For order as to maintainability of petition. ----------- Dated; 15th March 2024 Mr. Usman Farooq, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G. Ms. Samina Maqsood, Advocate for NADRA. -*-*-*-*-*- A statement alongwith annexure has been filed on behalf of the NADRA, which is taken on record, copy of which has been supplied to the learned counsel for petitioner. Learned DAG submits that no application for renewal of passport is available on the record and the petitioner may be directed to apply for renewal of Machine Readable Passport. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner will approach the relevant authority by applying renewal of his passport, however, requests that respondents may be directed to process the same at an early date without creating any unnecessary hurdles or objection to this effect. Instant Constitutional Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
